query.name: com.cabrillo.powerschool.ccgi.student_file
query.description: Returns enrolled high school students for selected schools.

arg.name: gpa_type
arg.description: Allowed values: Weighted, Unweighted, College, Other

query.sql:
WITH race_ranked AS ( SELECT sr.studentid, TRIM(sr.racecd) AS racecd, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY sr.studentid ORDER BY sr.racecd ) AS rn FROM studentrace sr ),
race_pivot AS ( SELECT studentid, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN racecd END) AS racecode1, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN racecd END) AS racecode2, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN racecd END) AS racecode3, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 4 THEN racecd END) AS racecode4, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 5 THEN racecd END) AS racecode5 FROM race_ranked GROUP BY studentid ),
gpa_data AS ( SELECT cr.studentid, cr.schoolid, cr.gpamethod, cr.gpa, cr.yearid, cr.grade_level, cr.dcid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY cr.studentid, cr.schoolid ORDER BY cr.yearid DESC NULLS LAST, cr.grade_level DESC NULLS LAST, cr.dateranked DESC NULLS LAST, cr.dcid DESC ) AS rn FROM classrank cr WHERE UPPER(TRIM(cr.gpamethod)) = CASE UPPER(TRIM(:gpa_type)) WHEN 'WEIGHTED' THEN 'WEIGHTED' WHEN 'UNWEIGHTED' THEN 'UNWEIGHTED' WHEN 'COLLEGE' THEN '10-12 UC/CSU A-G' WHEN 'OTHER' THEN 'CUMULATIVE' END ),
gpa_final AS ( SELECT studentid, schoolid, gpamethod, gpa, yearid, grade_level, dcid FROM gpa_data WHERE rn = 1 ),
ela_data AS ( SELECT ela.studentsdcid, ela.elastatus, ela.elastatusstartdate, ela.elastatusenddate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ela.studentsdcid ORDER BY ela.elastatusstartdate DESC NULLS LAST, ela.elastatusenddate DESC NULLS LAST, ela.id DESC ) AS rn FROM s_ca_stu_ela_c ela WHERE NVL(ela.excludefromstatereporting, 0) = 0 ),
ela_final AS ( SELECT studentsdcid, elastatus, elastatusstartdate, elastatusenddate FROM ela_data WHERE rn = 1 ),
student_email AS ( SELECT psc.studentid, TRIM(psc.email) AS email, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY psc.studentid ORDER BY psc.id DESC ) AS rn FROM psm_studentcontact psc WHERE psc.email IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(psc.email) IS NOT NULL ),
student_email_final AS ( SELECT studentid, email FROM student_email WHERE rn = 1 )
SELECT CASE WHEN TRIM(schx.cds_code) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(schx.cds_code) ELSE '99999999999999' END AS PrimaryCDSCode,
TO_CHAR(stu.student_number) AS LocalStudentID, LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR(stu.state_studentnumber)), 10, '0') AS StateID,
stu.first_name AS FirstName, NULL AS PreferredFirstName, stu.middle_name AS MiddleName, NULL AS PreferredMiddleName, stu.last_name AS LastName, NULL AS PreferredLastName, NULL AS Suffix,
TO_CHAR(stu.dob, 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS DateOfBirth,
CASE WHEN stu.gender IN ('M', 'F', 'X') THEN stu.gender ELSE NULL END AS Gender,
LPAD(TO_CHAR(stu.grade_level), 2, '0') AS GradeLevel,
CASE WHEN gd.gpa IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(gd.gpa), '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_CHAR(ROUND(TO_NUMBER(TRIM(gd.gpa)), 2), 'FM9999990.00') ELSE '0.00' END AS GPA,
LOWER(:gpa_type) AS GPAType,
NULL AS CalGrantGPA, NULL AS NSLP,
CASE WHEN TRIM(scx.lotecert) IN ('Y', 'N') THEN TRIM(scx.lotecert) ELSE NULL END AS LOTECert,
NULLIF(TRIM(scx.lotecertsource), '') AS LOTECertSource, NULLIF(TRIM(scx.lotecode), '') AS LanguageCode,
CASE WHEN scx.fosterprogram = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS FosterYouth,
NULL AS ParentConsent,
CASE WHEN stu.fedethnicity = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS HispanicEthnicity,
rp.racecode1 AS RaceCode1, rp.racecode2 AS RaceCode2, rp.racecode3 AS RaceCode3, rp.racecode4 AS RaceCode4, rp.racecode5 AS RaceCode5,
TO_CHAR(stu.entrydate, 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS EnrollmentStartDate, TO_CHAR(stu.exitdate, 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS EnrollmentEndDate,
se.email AS DistrictAssignedStudentEmailAddress,
CASE WHEN TRIM(scx.swdindicator) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS SWDIndicator,
CASE WHEN TRIM(scx.program504indicator) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS "504ProgramIndicator",
CASE WHEN TRIM(ed.elastatus) = 'EL' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS EL,
CASE WHEN TRIM(scx.ab469optout) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS AB469OptOut,
CASE WHEN TRIM(scx.homeless) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS Homeless,
CASE WHEN scx.migranted = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS Migrant,
CASE WHEN TRIM(scx.parented) IN ('10', '11', '12', '13', '14', '15') THEN TRIM(scx.parented) ELSE NULL END AS ParentGuardianEdLevel
FROM students stu JOIN schools sch ON sch.school_number = stu.schoolid LEFT JOIN s_ca_sch_x schx ON schx.schoolsdcid = sch.dcid LEFT JOIN race_pivot rp ON rp.studentid = stu.id LEFT JOIN gpa_final gd ON gd.studentid = stu.id AND gd.schoolid = stu.schoolid LEFT JOIN s_ca_stu_x scx ON scx.studentsdcid = stu.dcid LEFT JOIN ela_final ed ON ed.studentsdcid = stu.dcid LEFT JOIN student_email_final se ON se.studentid = stu.id
WHERE stu.schoolid IN (4130027, 4132817) AND stu.enroll_status IN (-1, 0) AND stu.grade_level BETWEEN 9 AND 12 AND stu.state_studentnumber IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sch.school_number, stu.grade_level, stu.last_name, stu.first_name

query.name: com.cabrillo.powerschool.ccgi.course_grade
query.description: Returns CCGI course grade data for active high school students.
query.sql:
WITH calpads_ap_ib_codes AS ( SELECT '9002' AS course_code, 'AP' AS academicindicator FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9003', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9004', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9005', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9066', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9067', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9118', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9119', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9146', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9147', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9148', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9149', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9150', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9151', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9152', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9153', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9191', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9192', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9193', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9194', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9195', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9196', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9197', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9198', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9199', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9225', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9226', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9258', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9259', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9266', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9267', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9268', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9300', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9344', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9345', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9346', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9347', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9348', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9349', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9350', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9361', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9362', 'AP' FROM dual
UNION ALL SELECT '9006', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9007', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9052', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9065', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9068', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9069', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9081', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9093', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9094', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9095', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9113', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9114', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9115', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9116', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9117', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9138', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9139', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9140', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9141', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9142', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9143', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9144', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9145', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9181', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9182', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9183', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9184', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9185', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9186', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9187', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9188', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9189', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9190', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9235', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9261', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9263', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9264', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9281', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9282', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9283', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9284', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9285', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9286', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9301', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9302', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9317', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9351', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9352', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9353', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9354', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9355', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9356', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9357', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9382', 'IB' FROM dual ), ccgi_course_grade AS ( SELECT DISTINCT stu.state_studentnumber AS stateid,
CASE WHEN sg.schoolname IN ('Half Moon Bay High School', 'Pilarcitos High School') AND TRIM(schx.cds_code) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(schx.cds_code) WHEN TRIM(sgrx.cds_code) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(sgrx.cds_code) ELSE '99999999999999' END AS cdscode,
CASE WHEN TRIM(sgrx.ccgi_atpcode) IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD(TRIM(sgrx.ccgi_atpcode), 6, '0') ELSE NULL END AS atpcode,
CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(200)) AS courseinstitutionname,
'N' AS isworkinprogress,
LPAD(TO_CHAR(sg.grade_level), 2, '0') AS gradelevel,
CASE WHEN t.firstday IS NOT NULL AND t.lastday IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(t.firstday, 'YYYY') || '-' || SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(t.lastday, 'YYYY'), 3, 2) ELSE NULL END AS schoolyear,
t.name AS termdescription,
CASE WHEN sg.storecode IN ('Y1', 'YR', 'FY') THEN 'F' WHEN sg.storecode = 'S3' THEN 'SS1' ELSE sg.storecode END AS term,
CASE WHEN sg.storecode IN ('Y1', 'YR', 'FY') THEN 'F' WHEN sg.storecode = 'S3' THEN 'SS1' ELSE sg.storecode END AS coursecurriculumterm,
NVL(TRIM(sgrx.alternatecoursenumber), TRIM(sg.course_number)) AS localcourseid,
TRIM(sg.course_name) AS transcriptabbreviation,
CASE WHEN sgrx.uccsu_area IS NULL THEN 'Z' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(sgrx.uccsu_area), 1, 1) IN ('A','B','C','D','E','F','G','Z') THEN SUBSTR(TRIM(sgrx.uccsu_area), 1, 1) ELSE 'Z' END AS subjectarea,
CASE WHEN crsx.ns_instructional_lvl IN ('14', '15') THEN 'H' WHEN lookup.academicindicator IN ('AP', 'IB') THEN lookup.academicindicator ELSE NULL END AS academicindicator,
CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(sgrx.ccgi_dualenrind_yn)) IN ('Y', 'TRUE', '1', 'DE') THEN 'DE' WHEN UPPER(TRIM(sgrx.ccgi_dualenrind_yn)) = 'N' THEN NULL ELSE NULL END AS dualenrollmentindicator,
NVL(sg.potentialcrhrs, 0) AS creditsattempted, NVL(sg.earnedcrhrs, 0) AS creditsearned,
CASE WHEN sg.grade IS NULL OR TRIM(sg.grade) = '' THEN NULL ELSE TRIM(sg.grade) END AS coursegrade
FROM storedgrades sg JOIN students stu ON stu.id = sg.studentid LEFT JOIN terms t ON t.id = sg.termid LEFT JOIN s_ca_sgr_x sgrx ON sgrx.storedgradesdcid = sg.dcid LEFT JOIN schools sch ON sg.schoolname = sch.name LEFT JOIN s_ca_sch_x schx ON schx.schoolsdcid = sch.dcid LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.course_number = sg.course_number LEFT JOIN coursescorefields csf ON csf.coursesdcid = c.dcid LEFT JOIN s_ca_crs_x crsx ON crsx.coursesdcid = c.dcid LEFT JOIN calpads_ap_ib_codes lookup ON TRIM(csf.alt_course_number) = lookup.course_code WHERE sg.schoolid IN (4130027, 4132817) AND stu.schoolid IN (4130027, 4132817) AND stu.enroll_status = 0 AND stu.state_studentnumber IS NOT NULL AND sg.grade_level BETWEEN 9 AND 12 AND NVL(sg.potentialcrhrs, 0) > 0 ) SELECT stateid, cdscode, atpcode, courseinstitutionname, isworkinprogress, gradelevel, schoolyear, termdescription, term, coursecurriculumterm, localcourseid, transcriptabbreviation, subjectarea, academicindicator, dualenrollmentindicator, creditsattempted, creditsearned, coursegrade FROM ccgi_course_grade ORDER BY stateid, schoolyear, term, localcourseid

query.name: com.cabrillo.powerschool.ccgi.course_catalog
query.description: Generates the CCGI Course Catalog file based on courses actively taught during the selected academic year.

arg.name: school_year_start
arg.description: Starting calendar year of the academic year, e.g. 2025 for 2025-2026

query.sql:
WITH calpads_ap_ib_codes AS ( SELECT '9002' AS course_code, 'AP' AS academicindicator FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9003', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9004', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9005', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9066', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9067', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9118', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9119', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9146', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9147', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9148', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9149', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9150', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9151', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9152', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9153', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9191', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9192', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9193', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9194', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9195', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9196', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9197', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9198', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9199', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9225', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9226', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9258', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9259', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9266', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9267', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9268', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9300', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9344', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9345', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9346', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9347', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9348', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9349', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9350', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9361', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9362', 'AP' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9006', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9007', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9052', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9065', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9068', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9069', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9081', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9093', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9094', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9095', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9113', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9114', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9115', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9116', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9117', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9138', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9139', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9140', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9141', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9142', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9143', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9144', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9145', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9181', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9182', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9183', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9184', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9185', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9186', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9187', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9188', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9189', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9190', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9235', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9261', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9263', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9264', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9281', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9282', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9283', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9284', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9285', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9286', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9301', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9302', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9317', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9351', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9352', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9353', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9354', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9355', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9356', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9357', 'IB' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9382', 'IB' FROM dual ),
storedgrades_ranked AS ( SELECT sg.schoolid, sg.course_number, sg.dcid AS storedgradesdcid, sg.schoolname, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY sg.schoolid, sg.course_number ORDER BY sg.dcid DESC ) AS rn FROM storedgrades sg ),
storedgrades_one AS ( SELECT schoolid, course_number, storedgradesdcid, schoolname FROM storedgrades_ranked WHERE rn = 1 )
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN sch.name IN ('Half Moon Bay High School', 'Pilarcitos High School') AND TRIM(schx.cds_code) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(schx.cds_code) WHEN TRIM(sgrx.cds_code) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(sgrx.cds_code) ELSE '99999999999999' END AS CDSCode,
CASE WHEN sgrx.uccsu_area IS NULL THEN 'Z' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(sgrx.uccsu_area), 1, 1) IN ('A','B','C','D','E','F','G','Z') THEN SUBSTR(TRIM(sgrx.uccsu_area), 1, 1) ELSE 'Z' END AS GraduationRequirements,
NULL AS Subject,
NULLIF(TRIM(crsx.transcriptcoursename), '') AS CourseTitle,
NULLIF(TRIM(c.course_name), '') AS Description,
CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(sec.course_number), '') IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(sec.course_number) ELSE '9999' END AS CourseNumber,
NULL AS CourseDuration,
NULL AS Academic,
c.credit_hours AS Credits,
CASE WHEN TRIM(crsx.ns_instructional_lvl) = '14' THEN 'Honors' WHEN apib.academicindicator IN ('AP', 'IB') THEN apib.academicindicator ELSE NULL END AS Honors,
'Y' AS Offered,
CASE WHEN TRIM(crsx.dept_grade_lvl_range) = 'MID' THEN 'Middle' WHEN TRIM(crsx.dept_grade_lvl_range) = 'SEC' THEN 'High' ELSE NULL END AS SchoolType,
CASE WHEN t.firstday IS NOT NULL AND t.lastday IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(t.firstday, 'YYYY') || '-' || SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(t.lastday, 'YYYY'), 3, 2) ELSE NULL END AS Year,
CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(ccf.alt_course_number), '') IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(ccf.alt_course_number) ELSE '9999' END AS StateCourseCode
FROM sections sec JOIN terms t ON t.id = sec.termid JOIN courses c ON c.course_number = sec.course_number LEFT JOIN schools sch ON sch.school_number = sec.schoolid LEFT JOIN s_ca_crs_x crsx ON crsx.coursesdcid = c.dcid LEFT JOIN coursescorefields ccf ON ccf.coursesdcid = c.dcid LEFT JOIN storedgrades_one sgo ON sgo.schoolid = sec.schoolid AND sgo.course_number = sec.course_number LEFT JOIN s_ca_sgr_x sgrx ON sgrx.storedgradesdcid = sgo.storedgradesdcid LEFT JOIN s_ca_sch_x schx ON schx.schoolsdcid = sch.dcid LEFT JOIN calpads_ap_ib_codes apib ON apib.course_code = TRIM(ccf.alt_course_number) WHERE sec.schoolid IN (4130027, 4132817) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.firstday) = :school_year_start AND NVL(crsx.state_excludefromreporting, 0) = 0 AND NVL(TRIM(crsx.dept_grade_lvl_range), 'SEC') IN ('MID', 'SEC') ORDER BY CDSCode, CourseNumber, Year
